calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Set For Trial On Nov-16-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Defendants Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; And, Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Attorneys Fees And Costs Against Defendants Reuven Meir Nakav And Nr Meir Design, Inc. And Their Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ingrid M. Evans, Esq. 415-466-8187 Evans Law Firm for Moving party
Margaret Lucyey Sell, Esq. 415-344-9670 Grotefeld Hoffman Plaintiff.
Kathryn Camerlengo, Esq. 650-365-7343 Gray Duffy Eisenbaum & Lee LLP for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest was received from moving party.

ARGUED. Ms Evans objects to the entire TR; sanctions, cites cases, basic violation of due process, meet and confer, timeline, identifies exhibits k,m,p,q. The court admonished moving party for stacked motions. Ms. Camerlengo responds; no confirmation from client, seeks clarification, have not received info from client, did due diligence. Ms Sell states discussions have been productive. The court comments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiffs Ingrid M. Evans and Arthur Klein's Motion To Compel Defendants Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; And, Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Attorneys Fees And Costs Against Defendants Reuven Meir Nakav And Nr Meir Design, Inc. And Their Counsel.

The court vacates the tentative ruling and grants the motion in full.

The court grants motion to compel As to Form Interrogatory # 12.1, Moving Parties did demonstrate Defendants' answer was incomplete or evasive or otherwise deficient under the Discovery Act. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2030.300(a).)

The court grants motion to compel As to Special Interrogatory # 1, Moving Parties did demonstrate Defendants' answer was incomplete or evasive or otherwise deficient under the Discovery Act . (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2030.300(a).)

The court grants motion to compel As to RFP ## 4, 5, 6, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26 & 27, Moving Parties did not demonstrate Defendants' responses were incomplete or otherwise deficient under the Discovery Act. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2031.310(a).)

Defendant has not carried their burden demonstarting the merit of any objection or to show that the answers were in fact complete or not evasive. The court finds that Defendant's position as to the discovery record is not substantially justified.

Defendants Nr Meir Design, Inc. and Reuven Meir Nakav are sanctioned in the amount of $2860 dollars payable to Ms. Evans forthwith, no later than December 9th, 2025. Further responses due no later than 12/9/25.

Ms. Evans to prepare a proposed form of order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Compel Defendants Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; And, Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Attorneys Fees And Costs Against Defendants Reuven Meir Nakav And Nr Meir Design, Inc. And Their Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Continued To Nov-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF INGRID EVANS INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE'S Motion To Compel Defendants Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; And, Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Attorneys Fees And Costs Against Defendants Reuven Meir Nakav And Nr Meir Design, Inc. And Their Counsel.

Continued to November 21, 2025 on Court's own motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-17-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
